betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Digamma Particle§f is an exotic quantum particle with §breality-altering properties§f - the most dangerous material in HBM's Nuclear Tech.

§c§4EXTREME DANGER:§f
• Even brief exposure causes severe consequences
• Can cause §cpermanent blindness§f and other effects
• Requires maximum protection at all times

§eObtaining:§f
• Produced in advanced particle physics setups
• Requires high-end infrastructure
• Handle with extreme care

§eUses:§f
• DFC (Digamma Field Containment) systems
• §bDigamma Laser Crystal§f production
• Ultimate end-game recipes

§aTip:§f Only work with Digamma particles once you have the absolute best protection available.
